question_en: What turning point does this unit emphasize?
choices_en: The rise of private banking discipline
The politicization of money through monetary nationalism
explanation_en: The chapter treats monetary nationalism as the point where money becomes a state instrument.
explanation_ko: 이 단위는 화폐 민족주의를 돈이 국가 도구가 되는 전환점으로 본다.
